docs.text:

just throwing markdown at it to see what sticks.

  • bar - the colored note boxes
  • baz - tables and checkboxes
  • getting-started - the boring setup one

docs.title: foo
docs.text:
testing code blocks here

inline code like this shows up fine.

python:

def hello(name):
    return "hi " + name  # whatever

bash:

mkdocs serve

js:

let x = [1, 2, 3]
console.log(x)

yeah that works. go to bar or baz. theres a deep-dive page buried somewhere too.

docs.text:

theres more in deep-dive if you actually care. otherwise just go back to foo.
